summary: Completed comprehensive testing of hierarchical filters functionality in AutoConnect dashboard. All backend APIs working correctly (18/18 hierarchical filter tests passed). Frontend cascading filters working perfectly with proper enable/disable behavior. KPIs update correctly based on filter selections. Breadcrumb functionality working as expected.

ui_bugs.issue: Chart width/height warnings in console - charts display correctly but show dimension errors

passed_tests: Backend hierarchical filter API endpoints (18/18 tests passed)
Group filter dropdown shows all available groups
Brand filter properly disabled initially and enabled after group selection
Agency filter properly disabled initially and enabled after brand selection
Seller filter properly disabled initially and enabled after agency selection
Hierarchical filtering: Group → Brand → Agency → Seller cascade working correctly
Dashboard KPIs update correctly when filters change
Dashboard trends API responds correctly with filter parameters
Breadcrumb shows selected filter hierarchy (Group → Brand → Agency)
All filter dropdowns present with correct data-testid attributes
KPI cards display correct values based on filter selections
Sales trend chart and aging distribution chart present and functional
Seller-specific view logic implemented (inventory KPIs hidden when seller selected)
Frontend-backend integration working correctly for all filter levels
Login functionality working with admin credentials
Dashboard page loading correctly with all components

success_percentage.backend: 100% (38/38 total tests passed - 20 basic + 18 hierarchical filter tests)
